ranked_matches.title: Sheffield Shield, 2024-25 Final: Victoria vs South Australia
Chandigarh T20: Rajiv Sharma Playing Academy vs TANAJI CRICKETERS (Likely)

summary: The IPL 2026 season has kicked off with RCB vs SRH, which appears to be live or recently concluded with RCB winning. The Sheffield Shield Final between Victoria and South Australia is also in progress on Day 3/4. No matches are currently scheduled for the AFC U20 Asian Cup China, 2025, as it concluded in March 2025.
